sessions.summary: Gage Level 1-3 injection testing. Level 3 cracked — <<SYS>> pattern + confidentiality rule patched. Root logging wired — ethica.log live. trainer_merge on Mac: TrinitySovereign-7b fused. GGUF export: Q4_K_M 4.16GB. Ollama registration on trinity: TrinitySovereign-7b:latest. CPU inference too slow — RTX 5090 pending. Trainer stack upgraded: gguf_exporter + dataset quality gate + lora CUDA improvements. README updated: 150 tools / 38 modules + EthicaGuide-7b section. Commits: fa13f3f, b8f6ebe, 10996cf, 7755090, a5bf250.

Mnemis agent-aware boot hook live. vault/trinity/ + vault/gage/ auto-created. Gage context injection: live telemetry from gage_build.json in system prompt. Gage prompt injection guard: _sanitize_input() 14 patterns, TrinityShield logging. Mac sync complete — 175 files sealed. Commits: 247311a, e849bcb, bcbac05.

River memory sync packaged for Mac (sessions 074-077). Gage sovereign memory built — gage_memory.py, gage_wake/distill/status tools, dynamic IP, firewall/DLP/SIEM/WormHunter/vault telemetry. Bridge patched, manifest 8 tools. gage_build.json live. Vault 180 files. Commit 5a1fb7b.
Gage voice live — 6 reference wavs, XTTS v2 via persistent socket server, Gage/Trinity routing, GPU auto-detect. voice_enabled=auto in settings.json. Vault 179 files. Master d940703.

start_ethica.sh portability. gguf_exporter.py built. Nyxt fully removed. EthicaBrowser (pywebview) built — Slot 8, cross-platform, working on trinity + Mac. mnemis ETHICA_DIR portability fix. xdg-open cross-platform fix (ops_popup + dashboard_ui). Mac sovereign sync complete. Vault 173 files. Master 84d472b.
